---
name: New Host Adapter
about: Request or propose a new host adapter
title: "[Host] "
labels: host-adapter
assignees: ''
---

## Host

Name of the IDE/agent host (e.g., Windsurf, Zed, Continue).

## Model Family

What model provider(s) does this host use?

## Switching Capability

- [ ] Supports dynamic model switching
- [ ] Model is user-controlled (config only)
- [ ] Model is host-controlled (no switching)

## Configuration Surface

How does this host accept configuration? (files, env vars, flags, etc.)

## References

Links to docs, API references, or relevant resources.
